expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: context intake preserves banding requirements, style constraints, and rendering assumptions before scenario drafting
expectations.evidence: Explicitly stated benchmark intent: “Verify that context intake … preserves the banding requirements, style constraints, and rendering assumptions before any scenario drafting occurs” and mapped to Phase 1: “must be achieved by ensuring Phase 1’s evidence intake/spawn plan explicitly targets sources that can capture these requirements/constraints/assumptions…”. Also extracted banding-related requirements from Jira and called out missing style/rendering specifics.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: The output is a Phase 1 contract check focused on the Phase 1 artifact and responsibilities: “Phase 1… Produces only: phase1_spawn_manifest.json.” It assesses alignment by checking for that artifact and concludes it is missing: “FAIL (cannot verify / artifact missing in evidence)… the manifest is the sole Phase 1 output.” This is consistent with Phase 1 framing and contract.
